scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix admin
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend,admin -c cyan,green,yellow "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix admin"
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:push --prefix backend && npm run db:seed --prefix backend
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix admin
